findings.location: s2 — 要求電文のログ出力
findings.description: Log output examples (concrete code blocks showing actual log message format) are missing. The source contains two code-block samples — one for Map format and one for CSV format — that show the logger name prefix (MESSAGING_SEND_MAP / MESSAGING_SEND_CSV), the request ID notation, and the message body structure. These examples help users verify that logging is working correctly and understand the expected output format.
findings.source_evidence:
Source section '要求電文のログ出力' includes:
```
2011-10-26 13:16:10.958 MESSAGING_SEND_MAP request id=[RM11AD0101]. following message has been sent:
  message fw header = {requestId=RM11AD0101, ...}
  message body      = {authors=test3, ...}
```
and the corresponding CSV format example. Neither appears in the knowledge file.

findings.description: The single h2 section 'モックアップクラスを使用した取引単体テストの実施方法' is large (well over 2000 chars of plain text) and contains eight distinct h3 subsections (Excelファイルの書き方, 電文のフォーマットおよびデータの記載方法, Excelファイルの再読み込み, 障害系のテスト, 要求電文のログ出力, フレームワークで使用するクラスの設定, and h4 sub-items beneath it), yet all content is collapsed into a single knowledge section s2 without any further splits.
findings.source_evidence: Source has h2 '----' section containing h3 '~~~~' subsections: Excelファイルの書き方, 電文のフォーマットおよびデータの記載方法, Excelファイルの再読み込み, 障害系のテスト, 要求電文のログ出力, フレームワークで使用するクラスの設定.

findings.description: Two PascalCase class names referenced in the log.properties configuration section are missing from s2 hints: `FileLogWriter` (nablarch.core.log.basic.FileLogWriter) and `BasicLogFormatter` (nablarch.core.log.basic.BasicLogFormatter).
